title: In the batchPointGet operation, the internal backoff information is not correctly displayed in the execution Info
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users(id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100), age INT, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE orders(order_id INT PRIMARY KEY, user_id INT, amount DECIMAL(10, 2), FOREIGN KEY(user_id) REFERENCES users(id));
SELECT u.name, o.amount FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE u.age IS NOT NULL AND o.amount > 20.00;
key_bug_features: Incorrect display of backoff information in BatchPointGet
